final_prompt.prompt:
Create an e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a beauty brand.

Style/medium: needs a "clean, bright, airy, feminine" aesthetic with floral accents and purple flowers — references in the spirit of Glossier product photography, 3CE Korean beauty brand campaigns, Kinfolk editorial minimalism; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be hero section layout with left column (text content), center (model with product), right column (product display + stat cards), bottom benefit cards row
Subject: must include young East Asian woman smiling and touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum
Scene/backdrop: needs a clean, airy studio backdrop — exact set design is yours
Lighting/mood: needs soft, bright lighting — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be soft pink and white dominant with purple floral accents
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include logo "LUMEA BEAUTY", navigation links "特徴" / "成分" / "お客様の声" / "使い方" / "FAQ", CTA button "今すぐ試す", headline "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", subheadline "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。", feature badges "敏感肌OK" / "高保湿" / "朝晩使える", bullet points "美容成分をしっかり届ける" / "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ" / "続けやすいシンプルケア", CTA buttons "初回限定で試してみる >" / "成分をチェック >", trust badges "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし", stat cards "満足度 96%" / "美容成分 5種配合" / "愛用者 12,000人突破", benefit cards "うるおい" / "透明感" / "使いやすさ"
Constraints: must preserve all UI elements — 5 navigation links, 3 pill-shaped feature badges with icons, 3 bullet points with pink checkmarks, 2 CTA buttons, trust badges, 2 product items (dropper bottle + packaging box), 3 floating stat cards with gold accents, 3 horizontal benefit cards
Avoid:
